title: lithocarpus kalkmanii
intro: Lithocarpus kalkmanii, a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines, is a member of the beech family (Fagaceae) and is commonly known as the Philippine beech tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus kalkmanii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent various diseases such as diabetes and certain types of cancer. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
